news.t: Sylogist Appoints Joel Leetzow as New CEO
Sylogist Shareholders Elect Full Slate of Board-Recommended Director Nominees at Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
Seven Shareholder Questions Tyler Proud Needs to Answer
Lazard Asset Management Announces Conversion of Mutual Fund to US Systematic Small Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: SYZ is an equity ETF with a total of 430 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coherent stock at 1.17%, Mueller Industries at 1.00%, Adeia at 0.90%, OPENLANE at 0.80%, and Clover Health Investments at 0.76%.

overview.description: The Lazard US Systematic Small Cap Equity ETF (SYZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in small-cap US companies. The funds stock selection process utilizes a proprietary automated fundamental analyst framework. SYZ was launched on Oct 29, 2021 and is issued by Lazard.
